# smiit GmbH

> smiit GmbH is a German digital consultancy based in Ehingen (Baden-Württemberg) that helps small and mid-sized enterprises (SMEs / "Mittelstand") run a data-driven transformation. We deliver tailored digital solutions across four areas: custom apps and workflows, data analytics and business intelligence, digital business strategy, and our own product smiit Analytics.

Website: https://www.smiit.de
Languages: German (default at /de/), English (at /en/)
Contact: kontakt@smiit.de · +49 160 4073198
Address: Reiherweg 96, 89584 Ehingen, Germany
Founders / Managing directors: Sebastian Grab, Noah Neßlauer

## Core pages

- [Home (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/): Overview of smiit GmbH and our value proposition for SMEs.
- [Home (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/): Same overview in English.
- [About (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/about/): Who we are, what we believe in, our team.
- [About (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/about/): Same in English.
- [Contact (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/contact/): Email, phone, contact form, online appointment scheduling via Calendly.
- [Contact (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/contact/): Same in English.

## Services

- [Apps & Workflows (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/services/apps/): Custom web applications and workflow automation tailored to SME processes.
- [Apps & Workflows (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/services/apps/): Same in English.
- [Analytics (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/services/analytics/): Data analytics, dashboards, KPIs, and business intelligence for SMEs.
- [Analytics (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/services/analytics/): Same in English.
- [Strategy (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/services/strategy/): Digital business strategy, roadmaps, and transformation guidance.
- [Strategy (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/services/strategy/): Same in English.

## Products

- [smiit Analytics (DE)](https://www.smiit.de/de/products/smiit-analytics/): Plug-and-play analytics solution with pre-built dashboards and KPIs for a fast SME start.
- [smiit Analytics (EN)](https://www.smiit.de/en/products/smiit-analytics/): Same in English.
